notableMoments: Stunned the football world by beating West Germany 2-1 in the 1982 World Cup, one of the greatest upsets in tournament history
Victims of the 'Disgrace of Gijón' in 1982, when West Germany and Austria played out a mutually beneficial result to eliminate Algeria from the tournament
Won the 2019 Africa Cup of Nations in Egypt, their second continental title, with Baghdad Bounedjah scoring the winner in the final against Senegal
Reached the Round of 16 at the 2014 World Cup in Brazil, their best ever result, pushing eventual champions Germany to extra time in a thrilling 2-1 defeat
Islam Slimani's brace against South Korea at the 2014 World Cup (4-2 win) remains one of the greatest Algerian performances on the world stage
Riyad Mahrez scored a legendary last-minute free-kick against Nigeria in the 2019 Africa Cup of Nations semifinal to send Algeria to the final
Ismaël Bennacer won the Best Player award at the 2019 Africa Cup of Nations, establishing himself as one of Africa's finest midfielders
Algeria qualified for the 2026 World Cup through the African qualifiers, returning to the world stage and aiming to surpass their 2014 Round of 16 achievement
